items.text: "Book before Friday" style intro out of the box.

items.title: Measurable ROI
items.text: Track form submits against offer changes.

splitHero.name: Split Hero
splitHero.tagline: Two-column hero with live activity feed
splitHero.summary: Pair a bold headline with a scrolling feed of recent jobs.

payload.heading: Split Hero
payload.text: Built for the Social Proof Feed layout. The left column sells; the right column shows real-time-style job activity so visitors feel the business is busy and trusted.

payload.caption: Headline plus live activity feed — built for social proof layouts.

items.title: Dual-column layout
items.text: Headline, highlight text and dual CTAs on the left; activity feed on the right.

items.title: Live activity lines
items.text: Configurable feed items with job text and time labels.

items.title: Brand colours
items.text: Pipe and hi-vis tokens flow from the site theme automatically.

items.title: Social proof layout
items.text: Core component of the high-converting Social Proof Feed page preset.

items.title: Urgency without hype
items.text: Shows activity, not fake countdown timers — authentic for tradies.

items.title: Quick setup
items.text: Feed items are list-editable like every other section.

textBox.name: Text Box
textBox.tagline: Flexible text block with optional side image
textBox.summary: Long-form copy with optional image — about us, story, methodology.

payload.heading: Text Box
payload.text: Full-width or image-side text block with eyebrow, heading, intro and rich paragraph. Place after hero for "our story" or methodology content.

payload.caption: Above-the-fold hero and layout blocks on a live LeadPages trade site.

items.title: Image optional
items.text: Right or left image — or text-only full width.

items.title: Alignment control
items.text: Left or centre text alignment.

items.title: Token support
items.text: {{businessName}} in heading auto-fills.

items.title: Storytelling
items.text: Partners add founder story or "why we started" copy.

items.title: Between sections
items.text: Inserts after hero in layout order when enabled.

items.title: SEO content
items.text: Extra keyword-rich paragraph without a new page.

trustBar.name: Trust Bar
trustBar.tagline: Scrolling badge strip under the hero
trustBar.summary: Licensed, insured, fixed pricing — instant credibility strip.

payload.heading: Trust Bar
payload.text: Thin badge row that sits directly under the hero on most layouts. Toggle badges on/off — licensed, insured, 5-star, 24/7, family owned.

payload.caption: Above-the-fold hero and layout blocks on a live LeadPages trade site.

items.title: Eight badge slots
items.text: Enable the badges that apply; hide the rest.

items.title: Icon-free labels
items.text: Text badges load fast — no image assets required.

items.title: Auto-inserted
items.text: Inserts after hero in layout order when enabled.

items.title: Universal trust
items.text: Every trade benefits from license and insurance proof.

items.title: One-minute setup
items.text: Toggle defaults on and publish.

items.title: Works with all layouts
items.text: Compatible with classic and premium presets.

videoReels.name: Video Reels
videoReels.tagline: Short-form video cards from the job site

payload.heading: Video Reels
payload.text: Video cards with title, duration tag, thumbnail and external video URL — opens in new tab. Perfect for Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts.

payload.caption: Portfolio, team and live job feeds — the proof stack partners sell.

items.title: Thumbnail per reel
items.text: Upload or link a poster image.

items.title: External video link
items.text: YouTube, Instagram or Vimeo URLs.

items.title: Tag/duration
items.text: "0:42" or "New" labels per card.

items.title: Younger demographics
items.text: Trades building TikTok/Reels audiences.

items.title: Social Proof layout
items.text: Video proof mixed with jobs and reviews.

items.title: No video hosting
items.text: Links out — no storage costs for partners.

why.name: Why Choose Us
why.tagline: Numbered reasons or icon points that build trust
why.summary: Answer "why you?" before the visitor compares competitors.

payload.heading: Why Choose Us
payload.text: Four proof points with icons or numbers — upfront pricing, on-time arrival, reviews count, years in business. Reduces bounce from comparison shoppers.

payload.caption: Services, reviews and quote sections working together on a client site.

items.title: Icon or number mode
items.text: Use icons for visual trades or numbered steps for process-focused messaging.

items.title: Four-up grid
items.text: Clean responsive grid — two columns on tablet, one on phone.

items.title: Token support
items.text: {{businessName}} token in the eyebrow auto-fills from site settings.

items.title: Objection handling
items.text: Partners pre-empt price, reliability and experience objections.

items.title: Reusable across niches
items.text: Same structure works for plumbers, cleaners and builders alike.

items.title: Low edit burden
items.text: Most partners tweak four lines and publish.

premiumGallery.name: Premium Gallery
premiumGallery.tagline: Design-led image galleries for large photo collections
premiumGallery.summary: Showcase mixed portrait and landscape photography with mosaic layouts, filters, categories and albums.

payload.heading: Premium Gallery
payload.text: Beautifully arrange mixed portrait and landscape images using premium responsive layouts, optional filtering, album navigation and controlled image expansion — without replacing Project Portfolio.

payload.caption: Smart mosaic with mixed orientations and lightbox zoom.

items.title: Structure modes
items.text: Simple, filtered, categories, or categories → albums → images.

items.title: Premium layouts
items.text: Smart mosaic, masonry, justified, filmstrip, slideshow and stacked.

items.title: Filters & lightbox
items.text: Tag pills, category browsing and a cinematic lightbox.
